name: DPD
summary: Generate DPD shipping labels and pickup locations straight from your order flow. Track and trace is synced back automatically.
tagline: Climate neutral, sustainable and innovative: all in one parcel.
about: DPD is a parcel delivery service that delivers packages quickly and reliably. They operate in many countries and offer services for both businesses and consumers. Their track-and-trace system lets you follow your parcel with ease. DPD stands for "Dynamic Parcel Distribution" and is known for its focus on sustainability and customer-friendly delivery options.

faqs.q: Are address details added to the shipping label automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, we request a shipping label from DPD based on an order's shipping details. You can adjust the address details manually if you want.
